title: Inspect and service clutch systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect and service clutch systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect and service clutch system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job, and examine for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job, and examine for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies 1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job, and examine for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect and service clutch system

elements.title: Inspect clutch system

pcs.text: Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect clutch system

elements.title: Service clutch system

pcs.text: Carry out service and adjustment activities according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures and rectify any issues identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out service and adjustment activities according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures and rectify any issues identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out service and adjustment activities according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.2 Carry out post-service testing according to workplace procedures and rectify any issues identified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Service clutch system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Carry out final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle or machinery is ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle or machinery is ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out final inspection to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle or machinery is ready for use4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
